resources.string: Tap \'Save Location\' to get current location
Are you sure you want to delete this location?
No saved locations yet.\nGo back and save your first location!
Enter your radio call sign (e.g., OZ1ABC)
Export your location history to Google Drive?
Locator is a comprehensive location tracking and documentation app designed for radio enthusiasts, field operators, and anyone who needs to track and export location data.

• GPS Location Tracking: Get accurate coordinates with altitude
• Maidenhead Grid Locator: Automatic grid square calculation
• Location History: Save and manage multiple locations
• Weather Data: Automatic weather capture from device sensors
• Multi-language Support: 10 languages available
• Google Drive Backup: Export your history to Google Drive
• Home Screen Widget: Quick access to current location
• Temperature Unit Preference: Choose Celsius or Fahrenheit
• User Call Sign: Save your radio callsign with locations

• Location (Fine & Coarse): For GPS tracking
 - REQUIRED for getting location coordinates

• Internet: Used ONLY for Google Drive export functionality
 - REQUIRED for cloud backup features

• Sensors (optional): For weather data collection
 - Temperature, humidity, pressure sensors
 - Not required but enhances functionality

**Privacy Commitment:** This app does not collect any statistics, analytics, or user data. All location history is stored locally on your device unless you explicitly choose to export it to your own Google Drive. Internet access is exclusively used for the export feature and weather data retrieval.

1. SAVE LOCATION
 - Press "Save Location" button
 - App gets GPS coordinates and grid locator
 - Weather data is automatically captured
 - Location is saved to history with timestamp

2. REFRESH LOCATION
 - Press "Refresh Location" to get new reading
 - Location is displayed but NOT saved
 - Useful for checking current position

3. VIEW HISTORY
 - Press "View History" to see saved locations
 - Each entry shows grid locator, coordinates, and weather
 - Tap "Open in Maps" to view location in Google Maps
 - Tap "Delete" to remove individual locations

4. EXPORT TO GOOGLE DRIVE
 - Go to Settings → Export to Drive
 - Choose your Google account
 - Location history is backed up as text file
 - Files saved in "Locator Backups" folder

5. HOME SCREEN WIDGET
 - Add widget to home screen
 - Shows current grid locator
 - Tap refresh button for new reading
 - Tap grid locator to open app

6. SETTINGS
 - Change Language: Select from 10 languages
 - Temperature Unit: Switch between Celsius/Fahrenheit
 - User Call Sign: Enter your radio callsign
 - Export to Drive: Backup your location history

• Add the widget to your home screen for quick access
• Export your locations regularly to Google Drive
• Use call sign to identify your locations in radio logs
• Check weather data for field operation planning
• The refresh button updates without saving history
• Grid locators help radio operators locate each other
• All locations are stored locally on your device
A comprehensive location tracking and documentation app for radio enthusiasts and field operators.

✓ GPS Location Tracking
✓ Maidenhead Grid Locator Calculation
✓ Location History Management
✓ Weather Data Integration
✓ Google Drive Backup
✓ Home Screen Widget
✓ Multi-language Support (10 languages)
✓ Temperature Unit Selection
✓ Radio Call Sign Support

• Location (Fine & Coarse)
• Internet (ONLY for GDrive export & weather)
• Hardware Sensors (Temperature, Humidity, Pressure)
• NO statistics or analytics collection
For support and feature requests, visit the project page.
